title: Trump May Pull Troops From Germany. That Isn’t as Scary as It Once Was.
summary_full: Germany has hugely increased its military spending, aiming to be less dependent on Washington. Its support for U.S. attacks on Iran may also give it leverage.
summary_public: Germany has hugely increased its military spending, aiming to be less dependent on Washington. Its support for U.S. attacks on Iran may also give it leverage.
